name: Multi-tool research chain (Exa + Firecrawl + Claude)
description: Chains multiple tools together: Exa searches for relevant pages, Firecrawl scrapes the top results for detailed content, and Claude AI synthesizes everything into a comprehensive research report. Posts results to Slack.

source.originalName: Build your own N8N workflows MCP server

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the research report

researchQuery.description: The topic or question to research

scrapeTopN.description: Number of top Exa results to deep-scrape with Firecrawl

steps.name: Search for relevant pages with Exa
Extract top URLs for deep scraping
Deep scrape top results with Firecrawl
Compile Exa summaries and Firecrawl deep content
Build Slack Block Kit research report
